gui.archetype.selection.title: Choose Your Class
gui.archetype.rebirth.title: Rebirth: Choose New Class
gui.archetype.info.title: Class Info
class.archetype.vi.name: Vi
class.archetype.vi.description: The embodiment of pure dynamics and aggressive combat. A professional killer relying on skill alone.
ability.archetype.vi.dash.name: Dash
ability.archetype.vi.dash.description: Charge forward dealing 3+WeaponDmg/3. Offhand items modify the dash. +1 charge per 10 lvl (max 3).
passive.archetype.vi.no_sneak.name: No Stealth
passive.archetype.vi.no_sneak.descriptio: Sneaking is blocked. You rely on speed, not stealth.
class.archetype.ram.name: Ram
class.archetype.ram.description: A massive creature straight from the Nether, born to destroy the End cities.
class.archetype.ram.lore_1: Born in the Nether to destroy the cities of the End...
ability.archetype.ram.rage.name: Rage
ability.archetype.ram.rage.description: Charge forward in fury with fire trail. 5 dmg + knockback. Offhand items change the ability.
passive.archetype.ram.hot_blood.name: Hot Blood
passive.archetype.ram.hot_blood.descript: Lava and fire cannot harm you.
passive.archetype.ram.fire_conspiracy.de: Set enemies on fire with your attacks while you are burning.
passive.archetype.ram.enemy_of_angel.des: Holy items (totems, elytra) are destroyed when held or worn.
passive.archetype.ram.growth_problems.de: Shields are too small for you. You cannot use them.
passive.archetype.ram.fragile_world.name: Fragile World
passive.archetype.ram.fragile_world.desc: Tools break 2x faster, bows break 4x faster.
class.archetype.lin_qi.name: Lin Qi
class.archetype.lin_qi.description: A physically weak mage with unstable control over his powers.
class.archetype.lin_qi.lore_1: Never known for strength or talent, the weakest of the Lin family...
ability.archetype.lin_qi.random_creation: Launch random projectile: snowball 70%%, arrow 25%%, potion 5%%. Improves with level.
ability.archetype.lin_qi.teleport.name: Teleportation
ability.archetype.lin_qi.teleport.descri: Throw ender pearl. 70%% snowball, 5%% egg. Success improves with level.
ability.archetype.lin_qi.space_rift.name: Space Rift
ability.archetype.lin_qi.space_rift.desc: Random world alteration. 64%% nothing. Changes gravity/size/speed/HP. 60s duration. Re-press to cancel.
Items gain random enchantment on pickup. 15%% curse of vanishing.
passive.archetype.lin_qi.arrow_transform: Normal arrows transform into random tipped arrows one by one.
class.archetype.ru_yi.name: Ru Yi
class.archetype.ru_yi.description: An exiled bandit who took up summoning magic after being cast out from his family.
class.archetype.ru_yi.lore_1: Exiled from his family, he turned to the dark art of summoning...
ability.archetype.ru_yi.devour_line.name: Devour: Line
ability.archetype.ru_yi.devour_line.desc: Summon evoker fangs in a line (up to 3). +1 per 10 levels, max 9.
ability.archetype.ru_yi.devour_target.de: Summon evoker fangs at looked-at block (1). +1 per 10 levels, max 9.
ability.archetype.ru_yi.devour_around.de: Summon evoker fangs around yourself (up to 4). +1 per 10 levels, max 12.
advancement.archetype.root.title: Archetype
advancement.archetype.choose_class.title: A New Path
advancement.archetype.rebirth.title: Rebirth
advancement.archetype.rebirth.descriptio: Change your class using a Scroll of Rebirth
